error_signature: Authorization failed - please check your credentials
title: Fal.ai API key authorization failure
symptom: Users receive an 'Authorization failed' error when trying to access fal.ai nodes, indicating issues with the API key.
not_this_if: Using a valid API key in the correct format
root_cause: The fal.ai API requires the API key to be included as an Authorization header in the request. If the key is not formatted correctly or not included, authentication will fail.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP node settings in your workflow
Add the fal.ai API key as an Authorization header in the format 'Authorization: Key $FAL_KEY'
agent_instruction: Ensure the fal.ai API key is added as an Authorization header in the HTTP node settings.
